description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build macOS Wheels that runs on every push and create event. Use a single macos-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up multiple Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.8, 3.7), cythonizes, builds wheels using cibuildwheel, runs tests with pytest for each Python version, and uploads the resulting wheels as an artifact named macos-wheels.
